description.ko: 소리를 물리적 실체로 탐구하며, 오디오 주파수를 생동감 넘치고 고동치는 빛의 구조와 유동적인 기하학적 패턴으로 변환하는 미래지향적인 여정입니다.
description.en: A futuristic exploration of sound as a physical entity, translating audio frequencies into vibrant, pulsating light structures and fluid geometric patterns.

prompt: Cinematic visualization of sound waves, ECHO-0 aesthetic, holographic frequency spectrum, pulsating light rings, fluid neon geometry, deep blue and electric violet color palette, high-tech abstract environment, 8k resolution, ethereal soundscape representation.
